---
title: "Elliott Bay Trail Run"
description: "Two photos from today's run along Seattle's Elliott Bay Trail."
author: "synesis"
date: "2026-04-24"
categories: [running, personal, photo, seattle]
image: 01.jpg
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](01.jpg)

![](02.jpg)
:::

Today's run on Elliott Bay Trail.

*Originally posted on [Mastodon](https://sigmoid.social/@BenjaminHan/116463846710471024).*
